TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Syang-kang "Ing a kamu, Hong Kong" misaapuyu tu sulit HKÔľŹHKG", hamin nipangangan Syang-kang micidekay a pikawawan "Ing a kamu Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, misaapuyu tu sulit, HKSAR anucaay Hong Kong SAR" nipangangan "kang" Kpahay a nipangangan "Syang-cyang" nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow tusa ku micidekay a pikawawan tu cacay, u Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-cow,Aw-kang aw-ta-wan,Ta-cong-hwa, Ya-tay-kitizaan a anganngan a tukay, atu cyen-ciw a tukay tu cacay. ť¶ôśłĮ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Hong KongÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKÔľŹHKG), :Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKSARśąĖHong Kong SAR),Áį°Á®Ī"śłĮ",ťõÖÁ®Ī"ť¶ôśĪü", . ayaw nu Cin a ziday ŚÖąÁß¶śôāśúü mueneng ku tademaw i Syang-kang, pakala tu 7,000 a mihcaan a likisi. Syang-kang maazih ku saayaway baluhay ba'tuay a ziday lalangawan nu "Ta-wan lalangawan", maliwasak i cung-kan-wan, Nan-a subal a Ta-wan at usen-wan, Cang-coway Si-wang, Ta-isan aSye-ti-wan atu Ce-lye-cyawa sen-wan, hu-ti-wan hatiza, u puduk izaw mamulmul ku sasa atu talyuk kuku' aikecan, angangan u cya-sa-taw, ba'tu aikecan izaw ku pudac nu kilang pu-pay, pen, yadahay abuhang a bakan hatini. i ayaw nu kung-yen 4000 a mihcaan, izaw tu tademaw i Syang-kang. 1816 a nihcaan, Amey-s-te pakaput mizizaw tu hwa, napacena' i Syang-kang, panukas I Ing-kow zikuz sakaput mitesekay tu likisi, " makay baluna tahkal micumus caluway atu hakalay mitaliyuk miazih tu hekal, uyni inayi i kitakitay ku kikapahan tu Lun-pi a minatu." minatu." 1841 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 26 a demiad, Ing-kow a kaygung i Ken-kow tatukus pahata, Syang-kang tatenga' mala Ing-kow tu a lala'. 4 a bulad, Ing-kow way-cyaw ta-cen ci Pa-may-cun pangangan Syang-kang subal u "inayi'ay ku tademaw a subal". itawya Syang-kang a tademaw 7,450 ku tademaw " pasu 2,000 ku pabalungaay a tademaw". 6 a bulad 7 a dem iad, i-li pakatineng u pahuyanyan ku Syang-kang. 1841ŚĻī1śúą26śó•, . 1842 a nihcaan ya-pyen a kalalais zikuz, Ing-kow midebung tu Syang-kang subal. 1843 a mihcaan 1 a bulad, Ing-kow situngusa mikawaw tu kanatal ci Ya-pow-tin sakamu sa, "Syang-kang huntu mala u pahuyanyan a kang, namahiza minatu a sata huntu adidi'entu, kapah paewang angangan u kalisiway a lalekalan a nicumud nu kalisiw, uyza u lala'." 1842ŚĻī, ." 4 a bulad 5 a demiad Wi-tu-li-ya a hungti pakawlah tu " Ing hung pakatineng' pasubana' patizeng tu "midebungay a tademaw i Syang-kang". 4 a bulad 6 a demiad, Wi-tu-li-ya tatayna a hungti pakawlah tu pow-sin-ca "hungti a luma' mitulun". 6 a bulad 26 a demiad, Syang-kang tatenga'ay tu tungus tu nu Ing-kow. 1860 a mihcaan, patizeng tu "matatelek tu Pey-cin", tatenga' mikelit tu Cyuw-lung-pan-taw pabeli tu Ing-kow. 1860 a mihcaan Ing micalap tu Cyuw-lung-pan-taw kakenis a zazan i satimulan. Saayaway a Kang-Ing mikuwan papulung tu midebungay-cu-I atu kasa binacadan-cu-i. 1895 a mihcaan cya-u kalalais pahezek zikuz, Te-kow, Haw-kow u kamu amilunguc micalaw tu lala', zikuz mabiyalaw, u Ing hini sa anu miading tu Syang-kang, kanca amiala tu sapikuwan tu capiay a lala'. duduc tu 1898 a mihca 6 a bulad 9 a demiad i Pey-cin macacudan "palahad tu Syang-kang akenis a kawaw" Cow-ng-kow misulul pakenis tu Syang-kang I saamis pabesut katukah Sen-cin-he sin-cye a kakitizaan, atu 235 a subal pacalil tu Ing-kow, katukuh 99 a mihcaan. 1898 a mihcaan pacici' papipacaliw tu nikenisan tu saamisa ,Sn-cin-he nutimulan u VCiw-lung-pan-taw ahelalay a lala' atu capiay a subal. hamin lala' nu Sin-cye hamin nu tapang, nu binawlanay na u tapang a lala' pacaliw tu katuudaay , ia'cus kakuniza sa amisumad tu lala' amicukaymas, cen-bu taneng amiala tu lala' muendngay nu tademaw, mala u kapulungan tu a lala' amicukaymas. 1941 a mihca 1 a bulad, Ing-kow situngusa tu nu kanatal ci Ciw-ci-al katukuh Ing-kow pahanhan Yen-tung talakaway nu mikeliday nu hitay apacudad musakamu, "anu mapuwh malalais ku Ing-Ze, Ing-kow a nayi' ku sapidiput tu Syang-kang! 12 a bulad 8 a demiad, Maw-ce-tung a cusi cung-kung-cung-yang cen ce-ci a katatengil. Pakayniay misakapah a kawaw, mipaicelang tu Nan-yang-hwa-cyaw a kawaw, ci Lyaw-cen-ce huntu caay katalaw patizeng tu kacacayat nu Syang-kang atu Ing-kow. 12 a bulad 11 a demiad, pahanhan kangn-Ing sakakaay a hitay ci Mu-te-pi saw-cyang mitulun alesen misebeng ku Ciw-lung, panukas kan g-taw a midiput. 12 a bulad 25 a demian sabaw siwa a tatukian, Syang-kang cung-tu ci Yang-mci atu mu-te-pi saw-cyang i pan-taw ciw-tyen pasayza Zipu a hitay mituw-syang,21 saculil 45 beti' tukiw pasakamu hitay nu Zi-pun midemung tu Syang-kang, pidemungan nu Zipun tu Syang-kang malingatu, 942 a mihcaan 1 a bulad, patizeng misakaku sakaput ku Syang-kang. 1945 a mihca 4 a bulad, Ciw-ci-al sakay Ameylika ci-hwa-ta-s sibalucu' Syang-kang panukasen ku Cng-kow patubeli, "amaydih tu Ing-kow panukas i Cung-kow tu Syang-kang, uyza dada' miawas tu kudih kya malaheci!" 9 a bulad 16 a demiad, muliyaw malikat ku Syang-kang 2003 a sadingsingan, mabuwah ku cayay ku bala' a imelang. ayzaay a lubungan, Syang-kang 1,755 ku balaliday nu SARS, pulung 299 ku mapatayay nu tademaw, satalakaway a kitizaan nu mapatayay. kakelul masipun macaliway ku 38 o'k kang nayay ku sakakawawan macakat katukh 8.7% ilikisi u satalakaway. maka likisi a miazih, Syang-kang a kakitizaan kalaliyas Syang-kang sumal, Ciw-lung atu sin-cye tulu a kalaliyas. Wi-tu-li-ya-kang unu Ameylika Cie-cin-san atu Pa-si-li-ye-ze-ney-lu asingangan i kitakit tut ulu nu tahak labuay a nanum nu Lyang-kang, ahebal I labu ku nanum nu kang, mihmihcaan caay kalakuli. . Ciw-lungpan-taw atu Syang-kang-taw i kitakit nu cayay kayadah ku nu tahakai labiay a nanum nu kang-wan, u ahemal pakala tu 1.5 katukuh 9.6 kung-li kalalabu 2 katukuh 14.5 depah, taneng pawapen tu tabakiay a balung pahuyanyan macacubelis pahanhan, u kahenulan a kitizaan malalais. Syang-kang a kyezay "maniyul ku kyezay", milayap masumad ku pinaay a kawaw tuud, namiala patahkalen aca. pinaay tu mihcaan, pinaay tu nu Syang-kang a cay-in-s mahiza tu patatenga', u sakaykic tu kawaw hawsa, pacakayay a icelang kikapahen ku pikuwan nu cen-bu tu canacanan, saca tatenga' adadawa. pahuyanyan pacakayay a keyzay, Syang-kang a keyzay micidak, . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ cacay Syang-kang nu migingkiway tu likisi, lalay nu Huwa tademaw a lala nu luma' atu siacaay a nizateng caay kalawpes i ayzaay a ziday nu Syang-kang. Zuma nu migingkiway tu likisi hini sa, Syang-kang syakay a lalangawan Cong-si a lalangawan malalacal atu papulung u kasatiman nu Cong-kow malukay misiwbayay lalay nu siacaay atu lisin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natidengan šł≠ÁĄ°Á∂≠ŚüļÁôĺÁßĎ : ť¶ôśłĮ

administrati*…ô *…ôgion, misaapuju tu sur~…ĺit, ńßksa* anu ¶aaj ńßoŇč koŇč sa*" nipaŇčaŇčan "kaŇč" kpańßaj a nipaŇčaŇčan "sjaŇč- ¶jaŇč" nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow tusa ku mi ¶id…ôkaj a pikawawan tu ¶a ¶aj, u ¶u- ¶jaŇč-san- ¶jaw- ¶ow,aw-kaŇč aw-ta-wan,ta- ¶oŇč-ńßwa, ja-taj-kitizaan a aŇčanŇčan a tukaj, atu ¶j…ôn- ¶iw a tukaj tu ¶a ¶aj. **(**:ńßoŇč koŇč***:ńßk*ńßkg), :ńßoŇč koŇč sp…ô ¶ajat nu sjaŇč-kaŇč atu iŇč-kow. ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, pańßanńßan kaŇčn-iŇč sakakaaj a ńßitaj ¶i mu-t…ô-pi saw- ¶jaŇč mitur~…ĺun ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn mis…ôb…ôŇč ku ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇč, panukas kan g-taw a midiput. ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômian sabaw siwa a tatukian, sjaŇč-kaŇč ¶uŇč-tu ¶i jaŇč-m ¶i atu mu-t…ô-pi saw- ¶jaŇč i pan-taw ¶iw-tj…ôn pasajza zipu a ńßitaj mituw-sjaŇč,** sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** b…ôti Ē~ ° tukiw pasakamu ńßitaj nu zi-pun mid…ômuŇč tu sjaŇč-kaŇč, pid…ômuŇčan nu zipun tu sjaŇč-kaŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu, *** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, patiz…ôŇč misakaku sakaput ku sjaŇč-kaŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺ sakaj am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i-ńßwa-ta-s sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sjaŇč-kaŇč panukas…ôn ku ¶Ňč-kow patub…ôr~…ĺi, "amajdińß tu iŇč-kow panukas i ¶uŇč-kow tu sjaŇč-kaŇč, ujza dada Ē~ ° miawas tu kudińß kja mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i!" * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, mur~…ĺijaw mar~…ĺikat ku sjaŇč-kaŇč **** a sadiŇčsiŇčan, mabuwańß ku ¶ajaj ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ajzaaj a r~…ĺubuŇčan, sjaŇč-kaŇč *,*** ku bar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu sa*s, pur~…ĺuŇč *** ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, satar~…ĺakawaj a kitizaan nu mapatajaj. kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ masipun ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku ** o Ē~ °k kaŇč najaj ku sakakawawan ma ¶akat katukńß *.*% ir~…ĺikisi u satar~…ĺakawaj. maka r~…ĺikisi a miazińß, sjaŇč-kaŇč a kakitizaan kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas sjaŇč-kaŇč sumar~…ĺ, ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇč atu sin- ¶j…ô tur~…ĺu a kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas. wi-tu-r~…ĺi-ja-kaŇč unu am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i…ô- ¶in-san atu pa-si-r~…ĺi-j…ô-z…ô-n…ô-r~…ĺu asiŇčaŇčan i kitakit tut ur~…ĺu nu tańßak r~…ĺabuaj a nanum nu r~…ĺjaŇč-kaŇč, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ i r~…ĺabu ku nanum nu kaŇč, mińßmińß ¶aan ¶aaj kar~…ĺakur~…ĺi. . ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇčpan-taw atu sjaŇč-kaŇč-taw i kitakit nu ¶ajaj kajadańß ku nu tańßakai r~…ĺabiaj a nanum nu kaŇč-wan, u ańß…ômar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *.* katukuńß *.* kuŇč-r~…ĺi kar~…ĺar~…ĺabu * katukuńß **.* d…ôpańß, tan…ôŇč pawap…ôn tu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇč pańßujanjan ma ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis pańßanńßan, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan mar~…ĺar~…ĺais. sjaŇč-kaŇč a kj…ôzaj "manijur~…ĺ ku kj…ôzaj", mir~…ĺajap masumad ku pinaaj a kawaw tuud, namiar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a. pinaaj tu mińß ¶aan, pinaaj tu nu sjaŇč-kaŇč a ¶aj-in-s mańßiza tu patat…ôŇča Ē~ °, u sakajki ¶ tu kawaw ńßawsa, pa ¶akajaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kikapańß…ôn ku pikuwan nu ¶…ôn-bu tu ¶ana ¶anan, sa ¶a tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° adadawa. pańßujanjan pa ¶akajaj a k…ôzaj, sjaŇč-kaŇč a k…ôzaj mi ¶idak, . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** ¶a ¶aj sjaŇč-kaŇč nu migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi, r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ńßuwa tad…ômaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu sia ¶aaj a nizat…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺawp…ôs i ajzaaj a zidaj nu sjaŇč-kaŇč. zuma nu migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi ńßini sa, sjaŇč-kaŇč sjakaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶oŇč-si a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ atu papur~…ĺuŇč u kasatiman nu ¶oŇč-kow mar~…ĺukaj misiwbajaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu sia ¶aaj atu r~…ĺisin. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natid…ôŇčan ****** : **
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Syang-kang "Ing a kamu, Hong Kong" misaapuyu tu sulit HKÔľŹHKG", hamin nipangangan Syang-kang micidekay a pikawawan "Ing a kamu Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, misaapuyu tu sulit, HKSAR anucaay Hong Kong SAR" nipangangan "kang" Kpahay a nipangangan "Syang-cyang" nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow tusa ku micidekay a pikawawan tu cacay, u Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-cow,Aw-kang aw-ta-wan,Ta-cong-hwa, Ya-tay-kitizaan a anganngan a tukay, atu cyen-ciw a tukay tu cacay. ť¶ôśłĮ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Hong KongÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKÔľŹHKG), :Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKSARśąĖHong Kong SAR),Áį°Á®Ī"śłĮ",ťõÖÁ®Ī"ť¶ôśĪü", . ayaw nu Cin a ziday ŚÖąÁß¶śôāśúü mueneng ku tademaw i Syang-kang, pakala tu 7,000 a mihcaan a likisi. Syang-kang maazih ku saayaway baluhay ba'tuay a ziday lalangawan nu "Ta-wan lalangawan", maliwasak i cung-kan-wan, Nan-a subal a Ta-wan at usen-wan, Cang-coway Si-wang, Ta-isan aSye-ti-wan atu Ce-lye-cyawa sen-wan, hu-ti-wan hatiza, u puduk izaw mamulmul ku sasa atu talyuk kuku' aikecan, angangan u cya-sa-taw, ba'tu aikecan izaw ku pudac nu kilang pu-pay, pen, yadahay abuhang a bakan hatini. i ayaw nu kung-yen 4000 a mihcaan, izaw tu tademaw i Syang-kang. 1816 a nihcaan, Amey-s-te pakaput mizizaw tu hwa, napacena' i Syang-kang, panukas I Ing-kow zikuz sakaput mitesekay tu likisi, " makay baluna tahkal micumus caluway atu hakalay mitaliyuk miazih tu hekal, uyni inayi i kitakitay ku kikapahan tu Lun-pi a minatu." minatu." 1841 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 26 a demiad, Ing-kow a kaygung i Ken-kow tatukus pahata, Syang-kang tatenga' mala Ing-kow tu a lala'. 4 a bulad, Ing-kow way-cyaw ta-cen ci Pa-may-cun pangangan Syang-kang subal u "inayi'ay ku tademaw a subal". itawya Syang-kang a tademaw 7,450 ku tademaw " pasu 2,000 ku pabalungaay a tademaw". 6 a bulad 7 a dem iad, i-li pakatineng u pahuyanyan ku Syang-kang. 1841ŚĻī1śúą26śó•, . 1842 a nihcaan ya-pyen a kalalais zikuz, Ing-kow midebung tu Syang-kang subal. 1843 a mihcaan 1 a bulad, Ing-kow situngusa mikawaw tu kanatal ci Ya-pow-tin sakamu sa, "Syang-kang huntu mala u pahuyanyan a kang, namahiza minatu a sata huntu adidi'entu, kapah paewang angangan u kalisiway a lalekalan a nicumud nu kalisiw, uyza u lala'." 1842ŚĻī, ." 4 a bulad 5 a demiad Wi-tu-li-ya a hungti pakawlah tu " Ing hung pakatineng' pasubana' patizeng tu "midebungay a tademaw i Syang-kang". 4 a bulad 6 a demiad, Wi-tu-li-ya tatayna a hungti pakawlah tu pow-sin-ca "hungti a luma' mitulun". 6 a bulad 26 a demiad, Syang-kang tatenga'ay tu tungus tu nu Ing-kow. 1860 a mihcaan, patizeng tu "matatelek tu Pey-cin", tatenga' mikelit tu Cyuw-lung-pan-taw pabeli tu Ing-kow. 1860 a mihcaan Ing micalap tu Cyuw-lung-pan-taw kakenis a zazan i satimulan. Saayaway a Kang-Ing mikuwan papulung tu midebungay-cu-I atu kasa binacadan-cu-i. 1895 a mihcaan cya-u kalalais pahezek zikuz, Te-kow, Haw-kow u kamu amilunguc micalaw tu lala', zikuz mabiyalaw, u Ing hini sa anu miading tu Syang-kang, kanca amiala tu sapikuwan tu capiay a lala'. duduc tu 1898 a mihca 6 a bulad 9 a demiad i Pey-cin macacudan "palahad tu Syang-kang akenis a kawaw" Cow-ng-kow misulul pakenis tu Syang-kang I saamis pabesut katukah Sen-cin-he sin-cye a kakitizaan, atu 235 a subal pacalil tu Ing-kow, katukuh 99 a mihcaan. 1898 a mihcaan pacici' papipacaliw tu nikenisan tu saamisa ,Sn-cin-he nutimulan u VCiw-lung-pan-taw ahelalay a lala' atu capiay a subal. hamin lala' nu Sin-cye hamin nu tapang, nu binawlanay na u tapang a lala' pacaliw tu katuudaay , ia'cus kakuniza sa amisumad tu lala' amicukaymas, cen-bu taneng amiala tu lala' muendngay nu tademaw, mala u kapulungan tu a lala' amicukaymas. 1941 a mihca 1 a bulad, Ing-kow situngusa tu nu kanatal ci Ciw-ci-al katukuh Ing-kow pahanhan Yen-tung talakaway nu mikeliday nu hitay apacudad musakamu, "anu mapuwh malalais ku Ing-Ze, Ing-kow a nayi' ku sapidiput tu Syang-kang! 12 a bulad 8 a demiad, Maw-ce-tung a cusi cung-kung-cung-yang cen ce-ci a katatengil. Pakayniay misakapah a kawaw, mipaicelang tu Nan-yang-hwa-cyaw a kawaw, ci Lyaw-cen-ce huntu caay katalaw patizeng tu kacacayat nu Syang-kang atu Ing-kow. 12 a bulad 11 a demiad, pahanhan kangn-Ing sakakaay a hitay ci Mu-te-pi saw-cyang mitulun alesen misebeng ku Ciw-lung, panukas kan g-taw a midiput. 12 a bulad 25 a demian sabaw siwa a tatukian, Syang-kang cung-tu ci Yang-mci atu mu-te-pi saw-cyang i pan-taw ciw-tyen pasayza Zipu a hitay mituw-syang,21 saculil 45 beti' tukiw pasakamu hitay nu Zi-pun midemung tu Syang-kang, pidemungan nu Zipun tu Syang-kang malingatu, 942 a mihcaan 1 a bulad, patizeng misakaku sakaput ku Syang-kang. 1945 a mihca 4 a bulad, Ciw-ci-al sakay Ameylika ci-hwa-ta-s sibalucu' Syang-kang panukasen ku Cng-kow patubeli, "amaydih tu Ing-kow panukas i Cung-kow tu Syang-kang, uyza dada' miawas tu kudih kya malaheci!" 9 a bulad 16 a demiad, muliyaw malikat ku Syang-kang 2003 a sadingsingan, mabuwah ku cayay ku bala' a imelang. ayzaay a lubungan, Syang-kang 1,755 ku balaliday nu SARS, pulung 299 ku mapatayay nu tademaw, satalakaway a kitizaan nu mapatayay. kakelul masipun macaliway ku 38 o'k kang nayay ku sakakawawan macakat katukh 8.7% ilikisi u satalakaway. maka likisi a miazih, Syang-kang a kakitizaan kalaliyas Syang-kang sumal, Ciw-lung atu sin-cye tulu a kalaliyas. Wi-tu-li-ya-kang unu Ameylika Cie-cin-san atu Pa-si-li-ye-ze-ney-lu asingangan i kitakit tut ulu nu tahak labuay a nanum nu Lyang-kang, ahebal I labu ku nanum nu kang, mihmihcaan caay kalakuli. . Ciw-lungpan-taw atu Syang-kang-taw i kitakit nu cayay kayadah ku nu tahakai labiay a nanum nu kang-wan, u ahemal pakala tu 1.5 katukuh 9.6 kung-li kalalabu 2 katukuh 14.5 depah, taneng pawapen tu tabakiay a balung pahuyanyan macacubelis pahanhan, u kahenulan a kitizaan malalais. Syang-kang a kyezay "maniyul ku kyezay", milayap masumad ku pinaay a kawaw tuud, namiala patahkalen aca. pinaay tu mihcaan, pinaay tu nu Syang-kang a cay-in-s mahiza tu patatenga', u sakaykic tu kawaw hawsa, pacakayay a icelang kikapahen ku pikuwan nu cen-bu tu canacanan, saca tatenga' adadawa. pahuyanyan pacakayay a keyzay, Syang-kang a keyzay micidak, . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ cacay Syang-kang nu migingkiway tu likisi, lalay nu Huwa tademaw a lala nu luma' atu siacaay a nizateng caay kalawpes i ayzaay a ziday nu Syang-kang. Zuma nu migingkiway tu likisi hini sa, Syang-kang syakay a lalangawan Cong-si a lalangawan malalacal atu papulung u kasatiman nu Cong-kow malukay misiwbayay lalay nu siacaay atu lisin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natidengan šł≠ÁĄ°Á∂≠ŚüļÁôĺÁßĎ : ť¶ôśłĮ

administrati*…ô *…ôgion, misaapuju tu sur~…ĺit, ńßksa* anu ¶aaj ńßoŇč koŇč sa*" nipaŇčaŇčan "kaŇč" kpańßaj a nipaŇčaŇčan "sjaŇč- ¶jaŇč" nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow tusa ku mi ¶id…ôkaj a pikawawan tu ¶a ¶aj, u ¶u- ¶jaŇč-san- ¶jaw- ¶ow,aw-kaŇč aw-ta-wan,ta- ¶oŇč-ńßwa, ja-taj-kitizaan a aŇčanŇčan a tukaj, atu ¶j…ôn- ¶iw a tukaj tu ¶a ¶aj. **(**:ńßoŇč koŇč***:ńßk*ńßkg), :ńßoŇč koŇč sp…ô midiput. ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômian sabaw siwa a tatukian, sjaŇč-kaŇč ¶uŇč-tu ¶i jaŇč-m ¶i atu mu-t…ô-pi saw- ¶jaŇč i pan-taw ¶iw-tj…ôn pasajza zipu a ńßitaj mituw-sjaŇč,** sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** b…ôti Ē~ ku bar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu sa*s, pur~…ĺuŇč *** ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, satar~…ĺakawaj a kitizaan nu mapatajaj. kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ masipun ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku ** o Ē~ °k kaŇč najaj ku sakakawawan ma ¶akat katukńß *.*% ir~…ĺikisi u satar~…ĺakawaj. maka r~…ĺikisi a miazińß, sjaŇč-kaŇč a kakitizaan kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas sjaŇč-kaŇč sumar~…ĺ, ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇč atu sin- ¶j…ô tur~…ĺu a kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas. wi-tu-r~…ĺi-ja-kaŇč unu am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i…ô- ¶in-san atu pa-si-r~…ĺi-j…ô-z…ô-n…ô-r~…ĺu asiŇčaŇčan i kitakit tut ur~…ĺu nu tańßak r~…ĺabuaj a nanum nu r~…ĺjaŇč-kaŇč, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ i r~…ĺabu ku nanum nu kaŇč, mińßmińß ¶aan ¶aaj kar~…ĺakur~…ĺi. . ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇčpan-taw atu sjaŇč-kaŇč-taw i kitakit nu ¶ajaj kajadańß ku nu tańßakai r~…ĺabiaj a nanum nu kaŇč-wan, u ańß…ômar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *.* katukuńß *.* kuŇč-r~…ĺi kar~…ĺar~…ĺabu * katukuńß **.* d…ôpańß, tan…ôŇč pawap…ôn tu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇč pańßujanjan ma ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis pańßanńßan, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan mar~…ĺar~…ĺais. sjaŇč-kaŇč a kj…ôzaj "manijur~…ĺ ku kj…ôzaj", mir~…ĺajap masumad ku pinaaj a kawaw tuud, namiar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a. pinaaj tu mińß ¶aan, pinaaj tu nu sjaŇč-kaŇč a ¶aj-in-s mańßiza tu patat…ôŇča Ē~ °, u sakajki ¶ tu kawaw ńßawsa, pa ¶akajaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kikapańß…ôn ku pikuwan nu ¶…ôn-bu tu ¶ana ¶anan, sa ¶a tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° adadawa. pańßujanjan pa ¶akajaj a k…ôzaj, sjaŇč-kaŇč a k…ôzaj mi ¶idak, . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** ¶a ¶aj sjaŇč-kaŇč nu migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi, r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ńßuwa tad…ômaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu sia ¶aaj a nizat…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺawp…ôs i ajzaaj a zidaj nu sjaŇč-kaŇč. zuma nu migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi ńßini sa, sjaŇč-kaŇč sjakaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶oŇč-si a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ atu papur~…ĺuŇč u kasatiman nu ¶oŇč-kow mar~…ĺukaj misiwbajaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu sia ¶aaj atu r~…ĺisin. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natid…ôŇčan ****** : **
